notableEvents.label: Brady House GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brady House grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman JJ Wetherholt to first baseman Alec Burleson. Luis García Jr. out at 2nd. Brady House out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Jorbit Vivas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jorbit Vivas grounds out, pitcher Riley O'Brien to first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Yohel Pozo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yohel Pozo grounds into a double play, third baseman Brady House to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Alec Burleson out at 2nd. Yohel Pozo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yohel Pozo GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Yohel Pozo grounds into a double play, third baseman Brady House to second baseman Nasim Nuñez to first baseman Luis García Jr. Alec Burleson out at 2nd. Yohel Pozo out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yohel Pozo pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yohel Pozo singles on a ground ball to left fielder Daylen Lile. Iván Herrera scores. Alec Burleson scores. Jordan Walker to 3rd.
